_comment: Industry reality per vertical: how customers ACTUALLY contact/book, which automations genuinely sell, a rough ticket size for economic framing, and service_price = the realistic UK MARKET RATE to quote the client for the main automation (OPERATOR-ONLY — never shown to the prospect). Matched by keyword against the discovery query / company / site text.

verticals.name: dental implant clinic
verticals.money_channel: phone calls and the website (online booking or contact form)
verticals.booking_culture: patients book high-value implant treatment by phone or the practice's online system — never via Instagram/Telegram
automations: instant text-back to every missed call
instant reply to web enquiry forms
verticals.service_price: AI receptionist + missed-call text-back: ~£1,000–£3,000 setup + £200–£500/mo. One recovered implant case (£2k–£15k) covers a year of it.

verticals.name: dental clinic
verticals.money_channel: phone calls and the website (online booking or contact form)
verticals.booking_culture: patients book by phone or online — not through social DMs
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + web-enquiry replies: ~£600–£1,800 setup + £150–£400/mo.

verticals.name: orthodontic practice
verticals.booking_culture: parents/patients enquire by phone and web form about a multi-month, high-value treatment
verticals.service_price: AI enquiry-responder + nurture: ~£1,000–£2,500 setup + £200–£450/mo. One booked plan pays for it.

verticals.name: aesthetics clinic
verticals.money_channel: Instagram & WhatsApp DMs AND phone — aesthetics is one of the few clinic types where social-DM booking is genuinely normal
verticals.booking_culture: clients really do DM on Instagram/WhatsApp to ask prices and book, alongside phone
automations: a 24/7 assistant in Instagram & WhatsApp that answers price questions and books
reminders and rebooking for repeat treatments
verticals.service_price: Instagram/WhatsApp booking assistant: ~£800–£2,500 setup + £150–£450/mo.

verticals.name: physiotherapy clinic
verticals.booking_culture: patients book by phone or online; some message on WhatsApp
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + rebooking reminders: ~£500–£1,500 setup + £120–£350/mo.

verticals.name: chiropractic / osteopathy clinic
verticals.booking_culture: patients book by phone or online system
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + reminders: ~£500–£1,500 setup + £120–£350/mo.

verticals.name: private GP / medical clinic
verticals.booking_culture: patients call or use the online system; discreet, not social
verticals.service_price: AI receptionist + reminders: ~£700–£1,800 setup + £150–£400/mo.

verticals.name: opticians
verticals.booking_culture: eye-test bookings by phone/online; product sales in store
automations: recall reminders for annual eye tests
verticals.service_price: Recall reminders + missed-call text-back: ~£500–£1,500 setup + £120–£300/mo.

verticals.name: veterinary clinic
verticals.booking_culture: owners call for appointments, often urgent
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + reminders: ~£600–£1,800 setup + £150–£400/mo.

verticals.name: fertility clinic
verticals.booking_culture: sensitive, high-value enquiries by phone and form — never social
automations: nurturing enquiries through a long decision
verticals.service_price: AI enquiry-responder + long-decision nurture: ~£1,500–£3,500 setup + £250–£550/mo. One cycle covers it.

verticals.name: plumbing / heating company
verticals.money_channel: the PHONE — emergencies; speed wins the job
verticals.booking_culture: customers call when something breaks and ring the next number if no answer; nobody books a plumber on Instagram
automations: instant text-back to every missed call
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back: ~£200–£800 setup + £99–£300/mo. One recovered call-out pays the month.

verticals.name: electrical contractor
verticals.money_channel: the PHONE and website quote requests
verticals.booking_culture: customers call or request a quote online; speed of response wins
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + quote follow-ups: ~£300–£1,000 setup + £99–£350/mo.

verticals.name: roofing contractor
verticals.booking_culture: homeowners call for a free quote and go with whoever responds first
automations: quote follow-ups so estimates don't go cold
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + quote follow-ups: ~£300–£1,200 setup + £120–£400/mo. One job covers it for years.

verticals.name: HVAC company
verticals.booking_culture: commercial & domestic clients call for service/installs; response speed wins
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + service reminders: ~£400–£1,200 setup + £120–£400/mo.

verticals.name: locksmith
verticals.money_channel: the PHONE — emergency, the fastest answer gets the job
verticals.booking_culture: people locked out call and ring the next result instantly if no answer
automations: instant text-back to every missed call
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back: ~£200–£700 setup + £99–£250/mo. A couple of call-outs covers the month.

verticals.name: bookkeeping / accountancy firm
verticals.booking_culture: businesses enquire by form/phone for an ongoing service
verticals.service_price: Enquiry qualifier + onboarding chase: ~£800–£2,500 setup + £150–£450/mo. One retained client pays for it.

verticals.name: law firm
verticals.booking_culture: clients enquire by phone and form; formal, not social
automations: nurturing enquiries that don't convert immediately
verticals.service_price: Enquiry qualifier + missed-call text-back: ~£1,000–£3,000 setup + £200–£500/mo. One matter covers it.

verticals.name: insurance / mortgage broker
verticals.booking_culture: clients submit forms and call; fast follow-up wins the deal
verticals.service_price: Enquiry qualifier + quote follow-ups: ~£800–£2,500 setup + £150–£450/mo. One extra client covers it.

verticals.name: trades / home-services company
verticals.money_channel: the PHONE and website 'request a quote' forms — speed wins the job
verticals.booking_culture: customers call or fill a quote form when they need work done, and ring the next company if no answer; nobody books a builder/cleaner on Instagram
automations: instant text-back to every missed call
instant reply to web quote requests
follow-up on quotes/estimates that went quiet
verticals.service_price: Missed-call text-back + quote follow-ups: ~£300–£1,000 setup + £120–£350/mo. One recovered job pays the month.

verticals.name: estate / letting agent
verticals.money_channel: phone, website enquiry forms, and portal leads (Rightmove/Zoopla)
verticals.booking_culture: buyers/tenants enquire by phone, web form and portal — the FIRST agent to respond books the viewing; speed wins the instruction
automations: instant reply & qualify to portal/web enquiries
follow-up on valuations that didn't list
verticals.avg_ticket: £1,500–£5,000+ commission per sale; ongoing % per let
verticals.service_price: Instant lead responder + viewing reminders: ~£800–£2,500 setup + £150–£450/mo. One extra instruction covers it.

verticals.name: financial adviser / IFA
verticals.money_channel: phone and website enquiry forms; referral-led
verticals.booking_culture: clients enquire by form/phone for a high-trust, slow-decision service; fast, human follow-up wins
verticals.service_price: Enquiry qualifier + nurture: ~£1,000–£3,000 setup + £200–£500/mo.

default.name: local service business
default.money_channel: phone calls and the website (contact form / online booking)
default.booking_culture: customers mostly call or use the website — a social-media link in the footer is usually marketing, not a booking channel
automations: follow-ups so enquiries don't go cold
default.avg_ticket: varies — frame the cost of a lost customer qualitatively
default.service_price: Missed-call text-back + web-enquiry replies: ~£500–£1,500 setup + £120–£400/mo (typical UK SMB market rate).
